per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REA requires the user to collect comment-related data, while REG-063 requires the controller to provide information about legitimate interests; these do not clearly express the same or directly conflicting constraint.

REA concerns collecting 'IP and browser user agent string' when leaving a comment, while REG-064 concerns informing the data subject about recipients of personal data; no quote-supported mismatch on the same constraint is shown.

REA states 'The User SHALL collect IP and browser user agent string... when leaving a comment,' whereas REG-066 requires the controller to provide further information at the time personal data are obtained; the obligations differ in actor, action, and object, so no direct conflict is established.
